openSource.heading: Built in the open.
openSource.body: {{name}} is free and open source. The code is on GitHub — read it, fork it, improve it, or adapt it for your own needs. We believe tools for writing and thinking should be transparent.
openSource.contributorsBody: {{name}} exists because of open source contributors. Every bug report, pull request, and suggestion matters.
openSource.contributeBody: Read CONTRIBUTION.md in the repository for guidelines on reporting bugs, suggesting features, and submitting pull requests.
openSource.footerNote: MIT licensed. No warranties. Built with care.
